title: Standard For Loop
description: Write a loop that prints the numbers from 1 to 5.
problemStatement:
Go only has one loop: `for`. Write a standard C-style loop that starts at `i = 1`, continues while `i <= 5`, and increments `i++`. Print `i` on each iteration.

**Expected Output:** 
`1` 
`2` 
`3` 
`4` 
`5`
